task_completion.visual_evidence: The SeisComP Configuration (scconfig) application window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the global configuration section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'global' module or section is selected in the left-hand navigation pane or tree view of the scconfig application.
The parameter 'agencyID' is visible in the main parameter list or right-hand pane of the scconfig window.

task_completion.description: Change the agencyID value to NIED
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field corresponding to the 'agencyID' parameter contains the exact value 'NIED'.
The 'Save' button is clicked, a 'Save' confirmation dialog is visible, or the UI indicates that changes have been successfully saved (e.g., no unsaved changes indicator).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the scconfig GUI rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration change must be performed within the graphical scconfig interface. There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'sed', 'echo', or 'awk' being used to modify global.cfg directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (such as nano, vim, or gedit) open and editing the global.cfg file directly.

integrity.description: Verify genuine interaction with the scconfig application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being interacted with is genuinely the SeisComP configuration tool, identifiable by its specific layout, icons, and title bar, rather than a mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target parameter: 'agencyID'. Initial value: 'GYM'. Expected value: 'NIED'. Required tool: 'scconfig' GUI application. The agent must use the scconfig GUI to modify the global configuration.
